mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM simulation_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_completed = 1
SELECT IFNULL(AVG(score), 0) FROM simulation_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_completed = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM simulation_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_completed = 1 AND score >= 60
SELECT * FROM simulation_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND scene_id = #{sceneId} AND is_completed = 1 ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT sr.user_id as userId, u.real_name as userName, COUNT(*) as totalPlay, AVG(sr.score) as avgScore, SUM(CASE WHEN sr.score >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as passCount FROM simulation_record sr LEFT JOIN user u ON sr.user_id = u.id WHERE sr.is_completed = 1 GROUP BY sr.user_id ORDER BY avgScore DESC, totalPlay DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM simulation_record WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND is_completed = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM simulation_record WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND is_completed = 1
